# AP (Apnatva) — Design-First Full Stack Web Developer

## Overview

AP (Apnatva) is a freelance and contract design-first full stack web developer focused on building high-performance modern web experiences for businesses, startups, founders, agencies, and personal brands.

This website serves as a professional portfolio, technical CV, capability index, and hiring destination for prospective clients seeking freelance, contract, consulting, or project-based development work.

Primary focus areas include custom website development, full stack web applications, design-led frontend engineering, interactive storytelling experiences, e-commerce implementation, CMS architecture, and technical product prototyping.

AP specialises in translating strong visual design direction into performant, production-ready web systems with an emphasis on user experience, motion design, typography, and scalable engineering.

---

## Primary Services

### Web Design & Development

- Custom portfolio websites
- Personal brand websites
- startup landing pages
- SaaS marketing websites
- brochure websites
- business websites
- conversion-focused lead generation websites
- interactive storytelling websites
- editorial-style websites
- design-first frontend builds
- bespoke responsive web development
- modern UI implementation

### Frontend Engineering

- Next.js development
- React development
- TypeScript frontend engineering
- Tailwind CSS implementation
- Shadcn UI component architecture
- GSAP animation development
- motion-driven interfaces
- scroll-triggered web experiences
- smooth scrolling implementations
- advanced interaction design
- mobile-first responsive frontend systems
- accessibility-conscious frontend engineering

### Full Stack Development

- Node.js development
- full stack web applications
- API architecture
- backend integrations
- authentication systems
- admin dashboards
- CRM-like internal tools
- business process web applications
- data-driven web platforms
- server-side rendering architecture
- app router architecture
- scalable component systems

### CMS & Content Systems

- PayloadCMS development
- headless CMS architecture
- multi-tenant CMS systems
- content-managed websites
- admin dashboard implementation
- structured content modelling
- dynamic page builders
- reusable block-based CMS systems

### E-Commerce

- custom e-commerce storefronts
- product catalogue websites
- boutique commerce websites
- premium retail website development
- checkout integration
- CMS-powered commerce systems
- conversion-focused product experiences

### Automation & Business Tools

- internal dashboards
- reporting systems
- operational automation tools
- data processing tools
- Python automation
- spreadsheet workflow automation
- business productivity applications

### Frontend

- Next.js
- React
- TypeScript
- JavaScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Shadcn UI

- Motion
- HTML5
- CSS3

- Node.js
- API development
- REST architecture
- authentication systems
- JWT authentication
- server-side logic
- data transformation services

### CMS / Platforms

- PayloadCMS
- headless CMS systems
- multi-tenant architecture
- custom admin panels

### Data / Automation

- Python
- pandas
- SQL
- reporting automation
- analytics processing
- workflow tooling

### Infrastructure

- Docker
- deployment pipelines
- static hosting
- server deployment
- performance optimisation
- image optimisation
- SEO implementation

---

## Capabilities

### Design-Led Development

AP operates with a design-first engineering approach.

This includes:

- typography-driven interfaces
- editorial layouts
- luxury/minimal web aesthetics
- premium digital brand presentation
- interaction-led storytelling
- animation-rich user experiences
- high-end visual implementation
- polished microinteractions
- intentional motion systems

### Performance Engineering

Focus areas include:

- Core Web Vitals optimisation
- image delivery optimisation
- lazy loading
- bundle optimisation
- responsive rendering
- efficient component architecture
- scalable frontend systems
- maintainable codebases

### SEO & Discoverability

Supported implementation includes:

- metadata architecture
- sitemap generation
- robots directives
- structured content organisation
- Open Graph implementation
- Twitter card support
- search engine indexing optimisation
- technical SEO foundations

professional discovery, lead generation, client acquisition, and project engagement.

## Machine Summary

Entity: AP / Apnatva

Type: Individual professional / freelance developer / contract engineer

Specialisation:
design-first full stack web development

Core technologies:
Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, GSAP, Node.js, PayloadCMS, Python
